name: BitRick's Venture
short_description: BitRick’s Venture is a fast-paced roguelite shooter with procedural map generation where you control BitRick, a guy with a questionable sense of humor who loves trash-talking after humiliating his enemies.
detailed_description:
BitRick’s Venture is a fast-paced roguelite shooter with procedural map generation where you control BitRick, a guy with a questionable sense of humor who loves trash-talking after humiliating his enemies.

Tired of survivor-like games where a run takes half an hour to end? Welcome. Here, you will die in under 8 minutes. But hey, look on the bright side… at least you can earn some cool hats while learning how to actually play!!

Can you make it through all the floors?

  • Multiple floors infested with horrifying creatures.

  • Random events that only help if you are really lucky.

  • Sinister bosses that will beat you up.

  • Over 40 items to aid you on your journey.

  • Over 30 cosmetics to unlock. Do they boost stats? No. But they will make you look awesome.

supported_languages:
English*, Portuguese - Brazil*
*languages with full audio support
